instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `assert-all` that evaluates its first argument once and asserts that every supplied unary predicate symbol holds on the resulting value.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 X))
            (ASSERT (NUMBERP #:G1))
            (ASSERT (PLUSP #:G1))
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 X))
            (ASSERT (NUMBERP #:G112))
            (ASSERT (PLUSP #:G112))
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
